1000655208.english: Aqua, how are your classes lately?

1000655209.english: Good. You need to keep attending them diligently from now on too.
1000655209.korean: 그래. 앞으로도 수업 열심히 나가야 해.

1000655217.english: You said you'd come visit before. If it's a bad time, I can come back later.
1000655217.korean: 전에 만나러 온다고 했으니까. 불편하면 나중에 다시 올까?

1000655218.english: Have you been well? Need anything?
1000655218.korean: 그동안 잘 지냈어? 필요한 건 없고?

1000655219.english: We're almost done Setting up our base, so everyone's about to take a break.
1000655219.korean: 우리 거점화 작업이 거의 끝나서, 이제 다들 쉴거야.

1000655220.english: If it's okay, come in. There are plenty of rooms… ah.

1000655221.english: Our squad's planning to open a café this time.
1000655221.korean: 우리 대원들이 이번에 카페를 준비한다고 하거든

1000655222.english: If you ask me why… I don't really have an answer. I don't know either. They just said they wanted to.
1000655222.korean: 왜… 냐고 물으면 또 할 말이 없네. 나도 잘 몰라. 그냥 하고 싶대.

1000655223.english: Well… I guess it could seem that way. But still…

1000655224.english: It's fun. Doing things with people you like.

1000655225.english: Yeah. Take your time to think about it.

1000655226.english: Well then, I'll go. Anytime— oh.

1000655229.english: If you lose it, just let me know. I'll reissue it for you.

1000655230.english: Uh… was this all a mistake?

1000655231.english: Yeah. But it's fine. I'll be waiting then.
1000655231.korean: 응. 그래도 괜찮지. 그럼 기다리고 있을게.

1000655234.english: CheonA, maybe…? No, actually, this works out. I'll go meet them.
1000655234.korean: 천아인가… 아니, 차라리 잘 됐어. 만나볼게.

1000655235.english: You weren't planning to hide from the start, were you.

1000655239.english: That much doesn't matter, but still…

1000655240.english: Don't harm me or our squad members.
1000655240.korean: 나랑 우리 대원들한테 해를 끼치지 마.

1000655246.english: You said ‘Please take care of me'?

1000655254.english: It's not that I dislike it… it's just awkward.

1000655255.english: …Alright, I give up. I accept it.

1000655259.english: If you feel like talking, then do it. Even later.

1000655275.english: Sorry, Andvari… can you not ask?

1000655276.english: It's not that… I just want to rest a little…
1000655276.korean: 그런건 아냐… 그냥, 조금 쉬고 싶을 뿐이니까…

1000655288.english: I just wanted to deny reality a little.

1000655291.english: Don't we have to catch them all?!

1000655295.english: No... when will I climb back up...

1000655299.english: But Yumi really doesn't miss a thing, huh?

1000655300.english: Then should we play together? I'll make a new ID.
1000655300.korean: 그럼 같이할까? 나 아이디 새로 만들게.

1000655306.english: W-wait a minute… the game just started…?

1000655308.english: We're about to have a team fight…?

1000655313.english: Vera, today's your day off, right?

1000655316.english: It's the morning of your day off.

1000655317.english: I'm going to sleep... since my life without work doesn't really have meaning anyway...
1000655317.korean: 잘래... 어차피 일이 없는 내 삶에는 의미가 없으니까...

1000655319.english: You'll be able to sleep well...

1000655323.english: - I was just trying to close my eyes for a moment on the bed when the captain's cabin door burst open.
1000655323.korean: - 잠시 침대 위에서 눈을 붙이려고 했는데 함장실 문이 벌컥 열렸다.

1000655324.english: Co, Commander! Oh no, oh no!

1000655325.english: Something really bad has happened, come quickly!

1000655326.english: I heard it from outside... It's not entirely accurate, but...
1000655326.korean: 밖에서 들은 거라... 정확하진 않긴 하지만...

1000655331.english: Kaen... has been sharpening since yesterday.

1000655332.english: Sharp... can cut anything. Even bone.
1000655332.korean: 예리해... 뭐든, 썰 수 있어. 뼈까지.

1000655334.english: We'll melt everything... Zenox said the two of them can handle it...
1000655334.korean: 전부... 녹여버릴 거야... 제녹스가 둘이서 할 수 있대...

1000655335.english: No. Emily alone might be in danger.
1000655335.korean: 안 돼. 에밀리 혼자면 위험할 수도 있어.

1000655337.english: We have to do the mission together. Sumire was worried about Kaen.
1000655337.korean: 임무... 같이 해야 해. 스미레가... 카엔, 걱정했어.

1000655341.english: I want to help both of them too...

1000655342.english: Emily has to handle things so I can finish it cleanly.
1000655342.korean: 에밀리가 처리해야 내가 곱게 갈아버릴 수 있어.

1000655343.english: I can't do it alone. It's only possible because Emily is there.
1000655343.korean: 나 혼자서는 못해. 에밀리가 있어서 가능한 일이야.

1000655346.english: Kaen, you're going to see blood. Are you okay with that?
1000655346.korean: 카엔은 피를 보게 될 거야. 괜찮아?

1000655347.english: Kaen... I'm used to blood. A lot.

1000655348.english: My hands... they're full, covered with it.

1000655349.english: If it's for the main mission... Kaen can do as much as needed.

1000655350.english: Sorry for putting you through something painful.

1000655351.english: If there's anything I can help with, I will.
1000655351.korean: 나도 도와줄 수 있는 게 있으면 도와줄게.

1000655355.english: If it gets dirty... Kaen can handle it alone.

1000655357.english: Emily and Zenox? Are you ready?

1000655360.english: I'm ready too, so we just need to set the date.

1000655363.english: Hey, I wasn't trying to eavesdrop... I was just passing by and the conversation was so chilling...!
1000655363.korean: 여, 엿들으려던 건 아닌데... 지나가다 대화 내용이 섬뜩해서...!

1000655364.english: I feel like something big is going to happen... What do you think?
1000655364.korean: 뭔가 큰일 날 것 같아... 어떻게 생각해?

1000655365.english: Co, Commander, you just heard it too! Processing, blood, mission! Even to the point of melting it away!
1000655365.korean: 사, 사령관도 방금 들었잖아! 처리, 피, 임무! 녹여버린다는 것까지!

1000655366.english: Shouldn't we go quickly and stop them? If someone gets seriously hurt doing this...!
1000655366.korean: 빨리 가서 말려야 하는 거 아니야? 이러다 누구 하나 크게 다치면...!

1000655368.english: - Someone who didn't know might misunderstand, but to my ears, it sounded normal.
1000655368.korean: - 모르는 사람이 들었다면 오해할 수도 있겠지만 내 귀엔 평범하게 들렸다.

1000655369.english: - Emily will clear the snow, Neodym will remove the stones from the ground, and then they will spread out the mats.
1000655369.korean: - 에밀리가 눈밭을 치우고, 네오딤이 바닥에 돌을 제거한 뒤 돗자리를 펼 것이고.

1000655370.english: - Kaen said he'd clean the fish first, right? You chose sushi for your picnic lunch.
1000655370.korean: - 카엔은 생선부터 손질한다 그랬지. 소풍 도시락으로는 초밥을 선택했구나.

1000655371.english: Sushi...? Why sushi all of a sudden...?

1000655372.english: I can make it right away, but... Uh... Okay, I understand...
1000655372.korean: 금방 만들어줄 수 있긴 한데... 어어... 일단 알았어...

1000655373.english: - Aurora, whose question hadn't been answered, tilted her head and returned to the kitchen.
1000655373.korean: - 의문이 해결되지 않은 아우로라는 고개를 갸우뚱하며 주방으로 돌아갔다.

1000655374.english: - Come to think of it, the ecological conservation area restoration work will be finished soon, won't it?
1000655374.korean: - 그러고보니 곧 생태 보존 구역 복구 작업이 끝나던가.

1000655375.english: - Since we're doing it anyway, I should tell them to go there.
1000655375.korean: - 이왕 할 거, 거기로 가자고 해야겠군.

1000655376.english: Wow~! Tomato juice is definitely best when it's 100% pure.

1000655377.english: It's been a long time since I've been able to relax without a worry in the world. It was really busy during the summer.
1000655377.korean: 아무 걱정없이 쉬는 건 오래간만이네. 여름 때는 한창 정신없었는데.

1000655378.english: Sometimes I miss them, but... Very rarely, but!
1000655378.korean: 가끔은 걔네들이 다시 보고 싶을 때도 있지만... 아주 가끔이지만!

1000655379.english: As expected, a leisurely time alone on a holiday...

1000655380.english: Are you saying that because you don't know how terrible a lonely death is?
1000655380.korean: 고독사가 얼마나 끔찍한지 몰라서 하는 말씀이신가요.

1000655382.korean: 혼자 있다 생을 마감하는 걸 말하는 거죠?

1000655384.english: If a body is left unattended and discovered after a long time...
1000655384.korean: 시체가 방치돼서 오랜 시간이 지나 발견되면...

1000655385.english: We just met after a long time, and you're already telling me another chilling story... You're really consistent, gloomy.
1000655385.korean: 간만에 만났는데 또 소름돋는 이야기를... 음침이, 너는 진짜 한결같구나.

1000655386.english: What's that instead? The door was locked, so how did you two get in?
1000655386.korean: 것보다 뭐야? 문 잠궈놨는데 둘이 어떻게 들어왔어.

1000655387.english: Heh heh, it's a simple task.

1000655388.english: Oh, and by the way, I removed the security alarm. Just in case I make a mistake.
1000655388.korean: 참, 방범벨은 제거해뒀어요. 혹시나 제가 실수할수도 있으니까.

1000655389.english: If there's noise, it'll bother the others, right?

1000655392.english: That's nonsense… You didn't even ask me, the owner of the room, for permission.
1000655392.korean: 후후같은 소리하네... 방 주인인 나한테는 허락도 안 받았으면서.

1000655394.english: I came at the agreed time for the meeting place.

1000655395.english: Meeting...? What meeting? I didn't hear anything.
1000655395.korean: 약속...? 무슨 약속. 난 들은 게 없는데?

1000655397.english: I was working late last night and didn't send it.
1000655397.korean: 어제 밤 늦게까지 작업하느라 못 보냈어요.

1000655398.english: That can happen once in a lifetime.

1000655400.english: Include me and tell me about it, include me!

1000655401.english: Why am I the only one who doesn't know!

1000655402.english: It's a meeting I happened to make yesterday while passing by.
1000655402.korean: 어제 지나가다 우연히 마주쳐서 한 약속이니까요.

1000655403.english: Calm down. Getting your pulse up isn't good for you.
1000655403.korean: 흥분을 가라앉히세요. 맥박이 상승하면 몸에 좋지 않아요.

1000655404.english: Really reminds me of old times…!

1000655405.english: Ha, at least I'm getting used to it… But why did you choose my room as the meeting place?
1000655405.korean: 하아, 그나마 좀 익숙해져서 다행이지... 그런데 약속장소는 왜 내 방으로 고른 거야?

1000655406.english: You can't come into my room because of the models.
1000655406.korean: 제 방은 모형 때문에 못 들어와요.

1000655407.english: My room's also off-limits because of the coffin.

1000655409.english: …So, what are we going to do? Now that we're all here.

1000655410.english: I'm not really bored, but well… since you guys came to hang out anyway.
1000655410.korean: 딱히 심심한 건 아니지만, 뭐... 이왕 너희들이 놀러왔으니까.

1000655411.english: Haven't you thought about what to do?

1000655414.english: I thought you'd have at least a little prepared…

1000655415.english: It hasn't even been 3 minutes since I heard that… ah, my blood pressure again…
1000655415.korean: 들은지 3분도 안 됐... 아, 또 혈압...

1000655417.english: What? Why are you opening the coffin?

1000655418.english: A smaller coffin inside the coffin, no way…!
1000655418.korean: 관 안에 더 작은 관, 설마...!

1000655419.english: I didn't expect to use the gift so soon.
1000655419.korean: 선물로 가져온 걸 이렇게 빨리 쓰게 될 줄은 몰랐어요.

1000655420.english: I'll add a music playback function so they can rest peacefully.
1000655420.korean: 편히 잠드실 수 있게 제가 음악재생 기능도 달아드릴게요.

1000655422.english: After such a long time, I wondered what you were doing, but you've been doing this all along…!
1000655422.korean: 간만에 와서 뭘 하나 했더니, 아까부터 계속...!

1000655423.english: Huh...? A cake in the coffin…?

1000655425.english: Even though we didn't spend much time together, we're special to each other.
1000655425.korean: 함께 보낸 시간이 길진 않았어도, 저희는 특별한 사이잖아요.

1000655426.english: Actually, we were planning a surprise party for Lady Draculina.
1000655426.korean: 사실 드라큐리나 양에게 깜짝파티를 열어주려고 했어요.

1000655428.english: …If you have something like this, you should say it first.

1000655429.english: I ended up being the bad guy alone… but, well…
1000655429.korean: 나만 나쁜 애 됐잖아... 그래도, 뭐...

1000655433.english: Are you sick or something that you have to ruin every touching moment?!
1000655433.korean: 감동을 파괴하지 않으면 안 되는 병에라도 걸렸어?!

1000655434.english: …Forget it, I'm already used to it.

1000655435.english: Want something to drink? There's more juice besides tomato juice.
1000655435.korean: 뭐 좀 마실래? 토마토 주스 말고도 다른 주스 많아.

1000655436.english: Then… I'll have fireworks to celebrate today.

1000655437.english: Fireworks? I have sensitive ears, so I don't like that…

1000655438.english: If you really want to, go outside and…

1000655440.english: Wait a minute. What's with that switch…?

1000655441.english: Why are fireworks coming out of my room?!

1000655442.english: Actually, I pulled an all-nighter yesterday because of this. It was tough keeping quiet so Draculina wouldn't wake up.
1000655442.korean: 사실, 어제 철야를 한 게 이것 때문이에요. 드라큐리나 양이 깨지 않게 조용히 하느라 좀 힘들었죠.

1000655443.english: Hehe, you're so surprised. It was worth preparing this.
1000655443.korean: 후후, 이렇게나 놀라주시다니. 준비한 보람이 있네요.

1000655444.english: I even brought heart medication, just in case your heart stops.
1000655444.korean: 강심제도 챙겨놨는데, 혹시 심장이 멈추시진 않았나요?

1000655445.english: What are you doing, idiots! Stop right now! What if something catches fire!
1000655445.korean: 뭐해, 바보들아! 당장 멈춰! 불이라도 붙으면 어떡하려고 그래!

1000655448.english: Over there, in that corner. Can you see it?

1000655449.english: That's something I installed separately. The black flames that resemble death are really beautiful.
1000655449.korean: 저건 제가 따로 설치한 거예요. 죽음을 닮은 검은 불꽃이 정말 아름다워요.

1000655450.english: Umchin, please try to read the mood…
1000655450.korean: 음침이, 넌 분위기 파악 좀 해 제발...

1000655452.english: Don't be disappointed—Hey, the fire actually caught!
1000655452.korean: 서운해하지 말- 야, 진짜 불 붙었잖아!

1000655453.english: Ah, in the end, death reached here too…!

1000655454.english: Don't worry. It's within the expected range.

1000655455.english: I installed sprinklers knowing this might happen.

1000655456.english: If I knew this would happen, I shouldn't have used fireworks… Wait, sprinklers?
1000655456.korean: 이럴 줄 알았으면 폭죽을 쓰지 말았어야지... 아니, 스프링클러?

1000655457.english: Ah, no! I have a lot of valuable stuff in my room!
1000655457.korean: 아, 안 돼! 내 방에 귀중한 거 많단 말야!

1000655458.english: Isn't there another way… another way…?

1000655460.english: It's impossible. Just like you can't escape impending death…
1000655460.korean: 불가능해요. 닥쳐오는 죽음을 피할 수 없듯이...

1000655461.english: Please let yourself rest in peace now.

1000655462.english: It's all because of you guys!

1000655463.english: Don't worry too much. It's the sprinkler I installed myself.
1000655463.korean: 너무 걱정하지 마세요. 제가 설치한 스프링클러니까요.

1000655465.english: So, how is it? You saw, right?

1000655466.english: Not a single drop of water got on us.

1000655467.english: What good is it if only we don't get wet…

1000655469.english: When am I going to buy all those things and decorate again...?
1000655469.korean: 저거 또 언제 다 사서 장식해...

1000655471.english: Inside the box that the cake was in earlier, there's another box.
1000655471.korean: 아까 케이크가 들어있던 관 안에, 다른 관이 있거든요.

1000655472.english: Heh heh, this was also within expectations.

1000655473.english: Get out of here right now, both of you!

1000655474.english: - A quiet room. A man and a woman are sitting side by side.
1000655474.korean: - 조용한 방. 한 쌍의 남녀가 나란히 앉아있다.

1000655475.english: I'm ready. As you said, in this box here...

1000655476.english: - Slowly... Carefully break the seal on the box.

1000655477.english: Of course. Then... The appropriate compensation is prepared, right?

1000655478.english: - Slowly nodding, he hands over a bulging bag.
1000655478.korean: - 천천히 고개를 끄덕이며, 빵빵한 봉투를 건넨다.

1000655479.english: One, two, three... This, this much?!
1000655479.korean: 하나, 둘, 셋... 이, 이렇게나 많이요?!

1000655480.english: How did you manage to stock up on all these snacks? They're all so popular that it's hard to get a taste of them!
1000655480.korean: 이 많은 과자들을 어떻게 챙겨두셨어요? 하나같이 인기 있어서 쉽게 맛보기 힘든 것들인데!

1000655481.english: Wow. This one and this one are both popular items! You're the best, Commander!
1000655481.korean: 우와. 이것도, 이것도 다 인기 상품인데! 사령관님 최고예요!

1000655482.english: There were also comics in the information area. I brought everything that looked interesting to me.
1000655482.korean: 정보 구역에 만화도 있더라구요. 제가 재밌어 보이는 것들로 전부 가져왔죠.

1000655483.english: Well, I worked hard to print it out to get that unique manga feeling...
1000655483.korean: 뭐, 만화책 특유의 감성을 느끼려고 열심히 프린트했지만...

1000655484.english: I got caught by Alpha and got scolded a lot. Hehe.

1000655485.english: - Orangeade smiles playfully and pretends to hit himself on the head.
1000655485.korean: - 오렌지에이드는 장난스러운 미소를 지으며, 자기 머리를 때리는 시늉을 한다.

1000655486.english: Still, I saved the rest on my tablet!

1000655487.english: Woohoo! I've been waiting for this time for so long. Oh, right! Do you know that, Commander?
1000655487.korean: 이예~ 이 시간을 얼마나 기다렸는데요. 아 맞다! 그거 아세요, 사령관님?

1000655488.english: It happened when I was on assignment. That day was a moderately warm spring day.
1000655488.korean: 제가 파견 나갔을 때의 일이었어요. 그날은 적당히 따스한 봄날이었죠.

1000655489.english: As usual, I was going around here and there to observe the movements of the Iron Blood according to Alpha-nim's instructions~
1000655489.korean: 평소와 같이 알파님의 지시대로 철충의 동태를 살피러 이곳저곳을 돌아다니고~

1000655490.english: It was really dangerous, secretly observing everyplace I could see, and sometimes even being chased away...
1000655490.korean: 보이는 곳마다 몰래 관찰하면서 어떤 때는 쫓겨 다니기도 하면서 정말 위험했었는데…

1000655491.english: At that moment, I felt like something terrible would happen to me if I kept going on these assignments. I just wanted to go straight to Orca Hole.
1000655491.korean: 그때만큼은 파견 다니다가 제가 큰일 날 것 같다는 생각이 들던 거 있죠? 그냥 확 오르카 호로 가버리고 싶었어요.

1000655492.english: But I can't just do it because I want to, can I? So, whenever I find a Saman Materials sales office, they have beer, right? Beer.
1000655492.korean: 하지만 제가 하고 싶다고 그럴 수는 없잖아요? 그래서 삼안 물자 영업소를 발견할 때마다 맥주 있잖아요. 맥주.

1000655493.english: How delicious that beer tasted in that difficult moment. You know, it's really happy to drink beer and read the manga I worked so hard to get?
1000655493.korean: 그 고달픈 순간에 마시는 맥주가 얼마나 맛있었는데요. 맥주 마시면서 힘들게 구한 만화책을 보는 게 정말 행복한 거 있죠?

1000655494.english: You're right! Thanks to the commander, I can finally have days off like this and relax comfortably...
1000655494.korean: 그러게요! 사령관님 덕분에 이렇게 편하게 쉬는 날도 오고...

1000655496.english: Please feel free to leave it with me anytime. Um... Except for field work. Hehe.
1000655496.korean: 언제든지 맡겨주세요. 그... 외근만 빼구요. 헤헷.

1000655497.english: Alright, alright! Let's watch some manga now. What should I watch first?
1000655497.korean: 자자! 이제 만화 보죠. 뭐부터 보면 좋을까?

1000655498.english: - Orangeade choosing a manga with a big smile. I also choose a comic book, following her lead.
1000655498.korean: - 싱글벙글 만화를 고르는 오렌지에이드. 나도 그녀를 따라 만화책을 고른다.

1000655499.english: - Fantasy and action are fun too, but this time I feel like watching something a bit more mellow.
1000655499.korean: - 판타지나 액션도 재밌지만 이번에는 조금 잔잔한 게 보고 싶은데.

1000655501.english: Do you have anything you'd like to see or a genre you prefer? I'll help you find it together.
1000655501.korean: 혹시 보고 싶은 거나 원하시는 장르라도 있으세요? 같이 찾아드릴게요.

1000655502.english: Or, I have a lot of them on my tablet too, so I'll find them for you. Heave-ho...
1000655502.korean: 아니면 태블릿에도 많이 넣어뒀는데 한 번 찾아드릴게요. 읏챠...

1000655503.english: - Orangeade sat beside me and took the tablet from my hand.
1000655503.korean: - 오렌지에이드는 곁에 앉아 내 손의 태블릿을 가져갔다.

1000655504.english: Then, a romance... Ahaha. The commander is already experiencing a romantic comedy.
1000655504.korean: 그렇다면 연애물을... 아하핫. 사령관님은 이미 러브 코미디를 겪고 있구나.

1000655505.english: Still, it's fun in its own way to read it as a manga. How about this one? The story of two students who are geniuses but awkward in love.
1000655505.korean: 그래도 만화로 보는 것도 나름 재밌어요. 이건 어떠세요? 천재지만 연애는 서투른 두 학생의 이야기.

1000655506.english: It's a romantic comedy, but it's easy to watch.
1000655506.korean: 러브 코미디지만 부담 없이 볼 수 있어요.

1000655507.english: Be sure to watch it later. Beside this, be sure to see the other things too. I look it up sometimes too.
1000655507.korean: 나중에 꼭 보세요. 이것 말고도 다른 것들도 꼭 보세요. 저도 가끔씩 찾아보거든요.

1000655508.english: While watching the manga, do you ever wonder if you could become like the main character? I want to have a love like that, so romantic!
1000655508.korean: 만화를 보면서 나도 주인공처럼 될 수 있을까? 저렇게 로맨틱한 사랑을 하고 싶어~

1000655509.english: ... I've often comforted myself by saying that.

1000655510.english: - There was a certain sadness that I couldn't quite explain that I felt from her as she spoke with a smile.
1000655510.korean: - 웃으며 말하는 그녀에게서 왠지 모르게 쓸쓸함이 느껴졌다.

1000655511.english: But now that the commander is here, it's okay. For a while, I won't have to go on any field trips, and since the commander is on vacation, we can play together like this, right?
1000655511.korean: 그래도 이제는 사령관님이 있으니 괜찮아요. 당분간은 외근 나갈 일도 없고 사령관님도 휴가니까 이렇게 같이 놀 수 있잖아요?

1000655513.english: Co-Commander? What's wrong? Why is my head suddenly... Ah, ah~
1000655513.korean: 사, 사령관님? 왜 그러세요? 갑자기 제 머리는 왜... 아, 아~

1000655514.english: How did you know I like having my head patted? Ahahaha...
1000655514.korean: 제가 머리 쓰다듬 받는 걸 좋아하는 건 어떻게 아시고 아하하하...

1000655515.english: - He continued stroking it without saying a word.

1000655516.english: Oh! I watch manga, manga. If you look at the tablet, I've organized them by genre. If you go into the folder...
1000655516.korean: 아! 만화, 만화 봐요. 태블릿 보시면 제가 장르별로 정리해두었어요. 폴더에 들어가시면...

1000655517.english: Um, Commander...? If you keep stroking me like that, it's a little embarrassing...?!
1000655517.korean: 저기 사령관님...? 계속 그렇게 쓰다듬으시면 조금 부끄러운데...?!

1000655518.english: - As if flustered, the orangeade's lips are trembling slightly, and I gently cover them with my own.
1000655518.korean: - 당황스러운지 조금씩 떨리는 오렌지에이드의 입술 위에 살포시 내 입술로 덮는다.

1000655519.english: - As I slowly parted my lips, her face flushed red, clearly visible at a glance.
1000655519.korean: - 천천히 입술을 떼자, 한눈에 봐도 알 수 있을 정도로 그녀의 얼굴은 붉게 물들었다.

1000655521.english: - Orangeade, stammering as if quite flustered.

1000655522.english: - Usually lively and talkative, she was now just staring at the floor and stammering.
1000655522.korean: - 평소에는 활기차고 말이 많은 그녀지만, 지금은 바닥만 바라본 채로 더듬기만 했다.

1000655524.english: - He slowly strokes her head again and whispers in a small voice.
1000655524.korean: - 다시 그녀의 머리를 천천히 쓰다듬으며 작은 목소리로 속삭인다.

1000655527.english: - I keep stroking the orangeade leaning against me.
1000655527.korean: - 내 품에 기댄 오렌지에이드를 계속 쓰다듬는다.

1000655529.english: - Orangeade looks up at me with a flushed face.

1000655530.english: I feel like I'm going to start talking a lot again... What should I do?
1000655530.korean: 저, 다시 말이 많아질 것 같은데... 어떡하죠?

1000655531.english: Hehe. Could the commander please quiet them down again?

1000655532.english: - That day, the orangeade was unusually quiet.
1000655532.korean: - 그날 오렌지에이드는 유난히도 조용한 채로 있었다.

1000655540.english: Aurora, could you make some dessert?
1000655540.korean: 아우로라, 디저트 좀 만들어줄 수 있어?

1000655541.english: It would be a bit disappointing if there weren't any snacks on the picnic.

1000655543.english: Oh... That must have been hard to get.

1000655544.english: So, where did Orangeade get the manga?
1000655544.korean: 그러면 오렌지에이드는 만화를 어디서 구한 거야?

1000655545.english: Okay. Let's start the manga appreciation session now!

1000655547.english: Thank you for continuing to help me.

1000655548.english: Yeah. There are so many types, it's hard to decide.

1000655550.english: Oh, that's what Mei was talking about before.

1000655552.english: So you get quiet in situations like this.

1000655554.english: Yeah. Let's relax and watch some manga together.
1000655554.korean: 응. 같이 만화 보면서 편하게 쉬자.

1000655556.english: - Several small, unnamed animals are frolicking in the grass of the ecological conservation area.
1000655556.korean: - 생태 보존 구역의 잔디밭에서 이름모를 소동물 몇몇이 뛰어놀고 있다.

1000655557.english: - I should look up what their names are later, or maybe Mnemosyne would like them? or.
1000655557.korean: - 나중에 이름이 뭔지 찾아봐야겠다거나, 므네모시네가 좋아하려나? 거나.

1000655558.english: - Who's stronger, Setti or those animals? Even the idle thoughts I often have, like "I wonder if I'll ever be able to do that," just drift away now.
1000655558.korean: - 세띠랑 저 동물들 중에 누가 더 셀까? 라는, 평소에 자주 하는 하릴없는 생각도 지금은 그대로 흘러가버린다.

1000655561.english: Would you like me to help you find an answer to that worry?
1000655561.korean: 그 고민에 답을 내리는 것을, 내가 도와주어도 되겠느냐.

1000655562.english: - You know everything, and you're trying to play with me by being vague? I swallowed the irritable remark, which wasn't like me at all, back down my throat.
1000655562.korean: - 다 알고 있으면서 두루뭉술한 말로 나를 가지고 놀 생각이야? 라는, ‘나’답지 않은 신경질적인 뒷말을 목구멍 속으로 삼켰다.

1000655563.english: That's perfectly understandable, no... that reaction is normal.
1000655563.korean: 충분히 그럴 수, 아니… 그런 반응이 정상이란다.

1000655564.english: First, let me say I'm sorry. Before I came here... I met a woman.
1000655564.korean: 우선 미안하다는 말을 전하마. 나는 이곳에 오기 전... 한 여성을 만났다.

1000655565.english: It was standing in the middle of the snowy field, as if it knew I was coming.
1000655565.korean: 마치 내가 올 것을 알고 있었던 것처럼, 설원 한 가운데에 서있었지.

1000655566.english: Yes, as you thought, the woman introduced herself as... Eva.
1000655566.korean: 그래, 그대의 생각대로 그 여성은… 에바라고 자신을 소개했단다.

1000655567.english: They said this place, the Ark of Memory, is under attack by Lemonade.
1000655567.korean: 이곳, 기억의 방주가 레모네이드에게 공격받고 있다고 했다.

1000655568.english: That's right. Since we're just two people moving around together, there's no way we could know what's happening across the sea.
1000655568.korean: 그렇단다. 단 둘이서 움직이는 우리가, 바다 건너에서 벌어지는 일을 알 수는 없는 노릇이니까.

1000655570.english: - After hesitating for a moment, Glacias finally opened his mouth with difficulty.
1000655570.korean: - 잠시 망설이던 글라시아스는 어렵게 입을 열었다.

1000655573.english: If I had told you beforehand, you would have doubted everything, not just this ark, but also me and Peregrinus. And...
1000655573.korean: 만약 내가 미리 말해주었다면 그대는 이 방주는 물론, 나와 페레그리누스를 포함해 모든 것을 의심했을테지. 그리고…

1000655574.english: - As you said, if I had heard the letter and Glacias' words beforehand, I would still be working on the Orca.
1000655574.korean: - 그 말대로, 편지와 글라시아스의 말을 미리 들었더라면 나는 아직 오르카 호에서 일을 하고 있었을 것이다.

1000655575.english: - More thoroughly than this time, the ark and... Glacias, you must have investigated Peregrinus.
1000655575.korean: - 이번보다도 더 철저히 방주와... 글라시아스, 페레그리누스를 조사했을거고.

1000655576.english: ... I asked them to take good care of you.

1000655577.english: When I asked why she didn't just tell him directly, Eva looked very sad.
1000655577.korean: 직접 말을 전하면 되지 않느냐는 내 물음에, 에바는 아주 슬픈 표정을 짓더구나.

1000655578.english: My loyal friend. What do you think was the reason Eva acted that way?
1000655578.korean: 맹우여. 그대는 에바가 그런 행동을 한 이유가 무엇이라고 생각하느냐.

1000655582.english: I came because it was frustrating to watch. It must be hard to beat around the bush like that.
1000655582.korean: 보다가 답답해서 왔수. 그렇게 돌려돌려 말하려니 힘들지.

1000655583.english: First of all... Sorry, friend. I didn't hide it from you with bad intentions.
1000655583.korean: 우선... 미안, 친구. 나쁜 의도로 너한테 숨긴 건 아냐.

1000655584.english: Just... At that time, I thot Eva was right.
1000655584.korean: 그냥... 그때 난, 에바가 옳다고 생각했어.

1000655585.english: Okay. All I heard was that you were someone precious and needed help, but...
1000655585.korean: 그래. 들은거라곤 네가 소중한 사람이고, 도움이 필요하다는 말 뿐이었지만...

1000655586.english: They looked desperate. That's why I accepted the request.
1000655586.korean: 절박해 보였거든. 그래서 부탁을 받아들였던 거고.

1000655587.english: Why did Eva act that way? I think it's that one.
1000655587.korean: 에바가 그런 행동을 한 이유? 나는 저거라고 생각해.

1000655588.english: - Peregrinus pointed to the fountain in the center of the district.
1000655588.korean: - 페레그리누스는 구역 중앙에 있는 분수를 가리켰다.

1000655589.english: Wow, this cafe. I could use it right away, couldn't I?
1000655589.korean: 우와, 이 카페. 바로 쓸 수도 있겠는데?

1000655591.english: Oh no, we already reserved this spot! No!
1000655591.korean: 아앗, 여기 저희가 미리 찜해놨거든요! 안 돼요!

1000655593.english: Let's spread out the picnic blanket here and wash our hands first.

1000655594.english: Hmm, it's so nice to smell the grass after so long, you know?
1000655594.korean: 음~ 오랜만에 풀 냄새 맡으니까 너무 좋은 거거든?

1000655595.english: Tommy, is your olfactory module working well?

1000655597.english: The cause, the scent of the gremlin's perfume is too strong.
1000655597.korean: 원인, 그렘린의 향수 냄새가 너무 진함.

1000655599.english: Heh heh, that's why I told you to spray just a little bit, right?
1000655599.korean: 후후, 그래서 조금만 뿌리라고 한 거거든?

1000655600.english: Where... If you could adjust the fatigue aspect a bit...

1000655601.english: Hmm, so bunny girl outfits are in style. It's a desirable phenomenon.
1000655601.korean: 음, 바니걸 의상이 유행이라니. 바람직한 현상이야.

1000655602.english: I wouldn't say I'm a bunny girl...

1000655603.english: Hehehe, I think Sergeant Ifrit is going to scold me.
1000655603.korean: 에헤헤, 이프리트 병장님한테 혼날 것 같아요.

1000655605.english: Mr. Moonbit, Ms. Momo. Look over there! They're planning to set up an outdoor stage!
1000655605.korean: 백토 씨, 모모 씨. 저기 좀 보세요! 야외 무대 설치 예정이래요!

1000655606.english: - The crew members are enjoying the rare break space with happy expressions.
1000655606.korean: - 대원들은 모처럼 생긴 휴식공간을, 즐거운 모습으로 즐기고 있다.

1000655607.english: To be precise... It will be the time we spend with you.
1000655607.korean: 정확히는... 우리가 그대와 보내는 시간, 일테지.

1000655608.english: As you said, if we had told them we met Eva first, we probably wouldn't be having this conversation right now.
1000655608.korean: 누님 말마따나, 우리가 에바를 만났다고 먼저 말해버렸으면 아마 이런 시간은 없었을테고.

1000655609.english: Haha, right? You did well to hide it, didn't you?

1000655610.english: Hey, buddy. Why are you being so stingy? If the results are good, then everything is good.
1000655610.korean: 에이, 친구. 째째하게 그러기야? 결과가 좋으면 다 좋은거라고.

1000655611.english: - Perhaps because of Peregrinus's cheerful atmosphere, the burden on my tightly closed heart seemed to have lightened.
1000655611.korean: - 페레그리누스의 유쾌한 분위기 덕분인지, 꽉 막혀 있던 마음의 짐이 가벼워진 것 같았다.

1000655612.english: Just think of it simply. Anyway, it's a win-win, right? You've been saying you're happy lately, thanks to me, right?
1000655612.korean: 그냥 쉽게 생각해. 어쨌든 이득이잖아? 덕분에 요새 즐겁다며.

1000655613.english: - Looking back after arriving at the ark... Although I lost my job, it was a good time.
1000655613.korean: - 방주에 도착하고 나서를 되돌아보면... 일을 빼앗기긴 했지만, 즐거운 시간이었다.

1000655614.english: - All day long, every day... The time I shared everyday life with the most precious people in the world.
1000655614.korean: - 하루종일, 매일매일... 세상에서 가장 소중한 사람들과 함께 일상을 공유했던 시간.

1000655615.english: What if it's a trap? What if Eva's forces, having received her instructions and only waiting for us to let our guard down, are preparing a surprise attack?
1000655615.korean: 만약 함정이라면? 에바의 사주를 받고, 우리가 방심할 때만을 노리는 병력이 기습을 준비중이라면?

1000655616.english: Then we will risk our lives to protect you. Right, sis?
1000655616.korean: 그렇다면 우리가 목숨을 걸고 널 지켜주겠어. 그쵸 누님?

1000655618.english: While I can't agree with the saying "just think easy,"...
1000655618.korean: 그냥 쉽게 생각하라는 말에는 동의할 수 없다만.

1000655619.english: That's because you're my older sister, but my friend is in a similar field as me, so they'll agree, right?
1000655619.korean: 그건 누님이니까 그런거지, 친구는 나랑 비슷한 과라 동의할걸요?

1000655620.english: Anyway, sorry for interrupting, but that's just my opinion.
1000655620.korean: 어쨌든, 중간에 끼어들어서 미안하지만 내 생각은 그래.

1000655622.english: - Peregrinus walked away toward the fountain without looking back.
1000655622.korean: - 페레그리누스는 뒤도 돌아보지 않고 분수쪽으로 가버렸다.

1000655623.english: Hoo hoo. That's just like Peregrinus.

1000655624.english: ... Have you lightened the burden on your heart a little?

1000655625.english: That's a relief. But... I haven't helped you come to a conclusion yet.
1000655625.korean: 다행이구나. 하지만... 나는 아직 그대가 답을 내리는 것을 도와주지 않았다.

1000655626.english: - Definitely, the only thing we were just talking about was Eva.
1000655626.korean: - 확실히 방금 전에 이야기 했던 것은 에바에 관한 것 뿐.

1000655627.english: - Regarding the long-standing question that resurfaced due to Eva's letter...
1000655627.korean: - 에바의 편지로 인해 다시 떠오른 오랜 의문에 대해서는...

1000655628.english: My friend, do you remember what I said?
1000655628.korean: 맹우여, 혹시 내가 했던 말을 기억하느냐.

1000655629.english: The statement that I keep my contracts because I value and consider them important.
1000655629.korean: 내가 계약을 지키는 것은 내가 그것을 소중하고, 중요하게 생각하기 때문이라는 말.

1000655630.english: Just as "Dragon Slayer" isn't the real world, the world my best friend and I live in might also be fake.
1000655630.korean: "드래곤 슬레이어"가 진짜 세계가 아닌 것처럼, 맹우와 내가 살고있는 이 세계 또한 가짜일지도 모른다.

1000655631.english: That's something no one in this world can know the truth of.
1000655631.korean: 그건 이 세계에 속한 자라면 그 누구도 진위를 알 수 없는 것이지.

1000655632.english: It doesn't matter who you are or where you come from. The only question you need to ask yourself is simply what you value.
1000655632.korean: 그대가 누구인지, 어디서 왔는지는 중요하지 않다. 스스로에게 해야할 질문은 그저 그대가 무엇을 소중히 여기는지, 이 단 하나뿐.

1000655633.english: The answer to that question is the very meaning of your life.
1000655633.korean: 그 질문에 대한 대답이, 바로 그대 삶의 의미란다.

1000655634.english: My friend, what is most precious to you?

1000655635.english: - My gaze naturally turned toward where the crew members were gathered.
1000655635.korean: - 내 시선은 자연스럽게 대원들이 모여있는 곳으로 향했다.

1000655638.english: - Glacias smiled kindly and held out his hand.

1000655639.english: Let's return to your precious loved ones. It seems like they're preparing something.
1000655639.korean: 그대의 소중한 존재들에게 돌아가자꾸나. 무언가를 준비하고 있는 것 같으니.

1000655641.english: Since I've become this kind of body, I really want to experience it.
1000655641.korean: 이왕 이런 몸이 되었으니, 꼭 경험해보고 싶구나.

1000655642.english: - He took Glacias' hand and headed toward the other members. Dew-kissed wildflowers and blue garden trees illuminated by artificial light are watching us.
1000655642.korean: - 글라시아스의 손을 잡고 대원들에게 향했다. 이슬이 맺힌 들꽃과 인공 조명에 비친 푸른 정원수들이 우리를 바라보고 있다.

1000655643.english: - As if trying to remember the time with my precious people, which will continue on.
1000655643.korean: - 앞으로도 계속 이어질, 내 소중한 사람들과의 시간을 기억하려는 것처럼.

1000655644.english: 3rd Anniversary Winter Event Part 1, < Ark of Eternal Winter > END.
1000655644.korean: 3주년 겨울 이벤트 1부, < 영원한 겨울의 방주 > END.

1000655645.english: Continues in Part 2 of the 3rd Anniversary Winter Event.

1000655646.english: Sorry, could you give me a moment alone?

1000655647.english: ...By the way, Glacias, are you also-

1000655652.english: So that's what she meant by the information being late.

1000655653.english: ...Why didn't you tell me in advance?

1000655658.english: You think it was the right thing to do?

1000655662.english: You'll pay the price for lying later.
1000655662.korean: 거짓말 한 대가는 나중에 따로 치뤄.

1000655664.english: Wait, you're seriously going in this situation...?

1000655671.english: It's probably party prep. We missed the year-end party this time.
1000655671.korean: 아마 파티 준비일거야. 이번에 연말 파티를 못 했거든.

1000655677.english: I'm sorry. I didn't think it through.

1000655679.english: I think everyone has their own way and pace that suits them.
1000655679.korean: 사람마다 각자 맞는 방법과 속도가 있다고 생각해.

1000655680.english: Lise, just go at the pace that's right for you.
1000655680.korean: 리제는 리제한테 맞는 속도로 하면 돼.

1000655681.english: We have plenty of time. I'm not going anywhere.
1000655681.korean: 시간은 많아. 나는 어디에도 안 갈 거니까.

1000655682.english: So for now… let's try this.

1000655683.english: As a kind of promise to adjust to each other. You too, Lise.
1000655683.korean: 서로 맞춰가자는 약속 겸 해서. 리제도 어서.

1000655685.english: Hmm, so it comes out like this after all. The ways you'd think of to make the queen happy are predictable. So, am I happy? ...I don't know yet. Still, I think it's heading in the right direction. So... I'll keep spending time with you.
1000655685.korean: 흐응, 결국 이렇게 나오는구나. 네 머리에서 나올만한, 여왕을 행복하게 만드는 방법이래봐야 뻔하니까.&n그래서, 행복하냐고? ...글쎄. 아직 잘 모르겠는걸. 그래도, 방향성은 맞다고 생각해.&n그러니까... 계속 어울려줄게, 너랑.

1000655687.english: She's in the infirmary, as usual.

1000655688.english: Her younger sisters are by her side, but...

1000655689.english: - I didn't even need to hear what was happening behind me; I could already imagine it perfectly.
1000655689.korean: - 뒤는 어떤 상황일지는 듣지 않아도 충분히 예상이 갔다.

1000655690.english: ..... Titania is fundamentally the same as me.

1000655691.english: - Titania was born at the same time as Rhea, but in different laboratories.
1000655691.korean: - 티타니아는 레아와 동시에, 서로 다른 연구소에서 태어났다.

1000655692.english: - They were designed to be from the same genetic lineage, with different abilities that complement each other, but... Unfortunately, Titania's design failed.
1000655692.korean: - 같은 유전 계통으로, 다른 능력을 지니고 서로를 보조하는 식으로 설계되었으나... 불행하게도 티타니아의 설계는 실패.

1000655693.english: - However, the researchers didn't want to discard the results of their time and budget investment, so they instilled jealousy and hatred in Titania toward Rhea.
1000655693.korean: - 하지만 연구자들은 시간과 예산을 투입한 결과물을 폐기하는 것을 원하지 않았고, 티타니아에게 레아에 대한 시기와 증오를 심었다.

1000655694.english: - As a result... Titania was able to output power, albeit unstably, thru those negative emotions.
1000655694.korean: - 그 결과... 티타니아는 그런 부정적인 감정을 통해 불안정하게나마 출력을 낼 수 있게 되었다.

1000655695.english: - Recalling the information related to Titania again, my chest felt heavy, as if I had swallowed a stone.
1000655695.korean: - 티타니아와 관련된 자료를 다시 떠올리자, 돌을 삼킨 것처럼 가슴이 답답해졌다.

1000655696.english: Even tho adjustments were made to their appearance and ability systems... In terms of personality, Titania and I are completely identical.
1000655696.korean: 비록 외모랑 능력 계통엔 조정이 가해졌을지언정... 성격만은, 저와 티타니아는 완전히 동일해요.

1000655698.english: In other words, I'm like that... They say that if you hate and envy someone, you become like Titania.
1000655698.korean: 다르게 말하면, 제가 그렇게... 누군가를 증오하고 질투하면 티타니아처럼 된다는 거예요.

1000655699.english: And to put it another way...

1000655700.english: - Leah nodded silently and then continued speaking.
1000655700.korean: - 말없이 고개를 끄덕인 레아가 말을 이었다.

1000655701.english: ...... So, I understand better than anyone how difficult and painful Titania must be feeling right now.
1000655701.korean: ......그래서 저는, 지금 티타니아가 얼마나 힘들고 고통스러울지 누구보다도 잘 알 수 있어요.

1000655702.english: And... And that there's nothing I can do.
1000655702.korean: 그리고... 제가 할 수 있는 일이 없다는 것도요.

1000655703.english: - When it was first restored, Titania went berserk the moment she saw Rhea.
1000655703.korean: - 처음 복원 되었을 때, 티타니아는 레아를 보자마자 폭주했다.

1000655704.english: - It was quite a while ago, but I still remember Leah's expression as she watched Titania, who had been given a sedative, being taken to the infirmary.
1000655704.korean: - 꽤나 지난 일이지만, 안정제를 맞고 의무실로 후송되는 티타니아를 바라보는 레아의 표정만은 기억하고 있다.

1000655705.english: - Since then, it hasn't happened again, but unlike her sisters, whom she simply ignores, she shows an extremely aggressive side only toward Leah.
1000655705.korean: - 이후로 그런 적은 없지만, 그냥 무시할 뿐인 자매들과는 달리 레아에게만은 극도로 공격적인 모습을 보여주고 있다.

1000655707.english: - I've thought about it before, but I believe the reason I pushed thru with Titania's restoration despite the fairies' vehement opposition was due to my own arrogance.
1000655707.korean: - 전에도 생각했지만, 페어리의 극렬한 반대에도 티타니아의 복원을 강행한 것은 내 자만심 때문이라고 생각한다.

1000655708.english: - Over time, experiencing various Bioroids and seeing them slowly open up to me... Unconsciously, they probably thought it would be the same this time too, and took it easy.
1000655708.korean: - 그동안 이런저런 바이오로이드들을 겪고, 그들이 서서히 내게 마음을 열어주는 것을 보면서... 무의식적으로 이번에도 그렇게 되겠네, 하고 쉽게 생각했겠지.

1000655709.english: - And now... I also know very well why the fairies, especially Rhea, vehemently opposed Titania's restoration.
1000655709.korean: - 그리고 이제는... 페어리, 그중에서도 특히 레아가 티타니아의 복원을 극렬하게 반대했던 이유도 잘 알고 있다.

1000655711.english: Still, it's better than it was at first, isn't it? At least to my master.

1000655712.english: It hasn't been long since we were able to have even a short 'conversation' like last time.
1000655712.korean: - 저번처럼 짧게라도 '대화'가 이어지게 된 것도 얼마 되지 않았다.

1000655713.english: - I came this far by persistently seeking you out, continuing my unanswered lament, and enduring your justified hatred.
1000655713.korean: - 끈질기게 찾아가서 대답 없는 넋두리를 이어가고, 이유 있는 증오를 받아내 가면서 여기까지 왔다.

1000655715.english: Yes, Master. Always... I believe you.

1000655717.korean: 리제 언니. 티타니아 언니 바이탈은 어때요?

1000655719.english: Still, you need to keep monitoring it.

1000655721.english: Would you like some apple...? I carved it...

1000655722.english: Oh, sis... Cover yourself well with the blanket - Aaaah?!
1000655722.korean: 어, 언니... 이불 잘 덮고- 으아?!

1000655726.english: It's okay, it's okay. I just tripped and fell, so...

1000655728.english: - I picked up Aqua, who had fallen because Titania pushed her away.
1000655728.korean: - 티타니아가 밀어내는 바람에 넘어진 아쿠아를 안아 들었다.

1000655732.english: - Daphne, Lise, Dryad... And seeing the regret in Titania's gaze as she looked at Aqua in my arms, I couldn't help but feel relieved.
1000655732.korean: - 다프네, 리제, 드리아드... 그리고 내 품에 안겨 있는 아쿠아를 보는 티타니아의 시선에 후회가 감도는 것을 보고 내심 안도할 수 있었다.

1000655734.english: - Titania sat on the bed, leaned back, and closed her eyes.
1000655734.korean: - 티타니아는 침대에 앉아 등을 기댄 그대로 눈을 감아 버렸다.

1000655737.english: ... No, you can't. It hasn't been stable for long, so the master is in danger.
1000655737.korean: ...안 돼요. 아직 안정된 지 얼마 되지 않아서 주인님이 위험해요.

1000655738.english: Since we'll be here, it might be a good idea for you to come and check in on us from time to time...
1000655738.korean: 저희가 있을 테니까, 한 번씩 보러오시는 게...

1000655739.english: Even while they were talking, Titania simply kept her eyes closed.
1000655739.korean: - 이야기를 나누는 중에도, 티타니아는 그저 눈을 감고 있을 뿐이었다.

1000655740.english: - As if we had nothing to do with them at all.
1000655740.korean: - 마치 자신과 우리는 전혀 상관없다는 듯이.

1000655742.english: Are you going to the infirmary again today?

1000655743.english: - And so, for a while, I spent most of my time in the infirmary, specifically by Titania's side.
1000655743.korean: - 그렇게 한동안 대부분의 시간을 의무실에서, 정확히는 티타니아의 옆에서 보냈다.

1000655744.english: - Although most of my words are still ignored, there are times when he looks at me without saying anything or gives a cold response.
1000655744.korean: - 여전히 대부분의 말은 무시당하고 있지만, 가끔씩 말없이 바라보거나 차갑게나마 대답을 해주는 경우가 생겼다.

1000655745.english: I heard your dosage of tranquilizers has been significantly reduced recently, and you've even been able to chat with your sisters, even if it's just for a short while.
1000655745.korean: 요즘 안정제 투여량도 많이 줄었고, 자매들이랑 짧게나마 이야기도 나눈다고 들었어요.

1000655752.english: It hurts so much... my head, my whole body... ugh...!

1000655755.english: Really... I'm such an idiot... There's no way I'd be allowed to... Ugh...
1000655755.korean: 정말… 바보 같아… 나한테 그런 게 허락될 리가… 윽...

1000655756.english: ...Ah, yes... you don't need to hold back... just...

1000655757.english: If we kill them all... the Queen will be at ease...

1000655758.english: ...No more useless words, no more faces I don't want to see... or...?
1000655758.korean: …더 이상, 쓸데 없는 말도, 보기 싫은 얼굴… 도…?

1000655760.english: - Titania stared at me with a bewildered expression as I waddled toward her, covered from head to toe in thick protective gear... no, armor.
1000655760.korean: - 티타니아는 머리부터 발끝까지 두꺼운 방호복… 아니, 갑주를 입고 뒤뚱뒤뚱 걸어오는 나를 망연한 얼굴로 바라봤다.

1000655761.english: - Saying that, I plopped down in front of Titania.
1000655761.korean: - 그렇게 말하며 나는 티타니아의 앞에 털썩 앉았다.

1000655763.english: - The frost storm that had been enveloping Titania and freezing the surrounding area intensified.
1000655763.korean: - 티타니아를 감싸고, 일대를 꽁꽁 얼려버리고 있던 서리 폭풍이 거세졌다.

1000655764.english: - But... All that touches me is the snow flurries blown by the wind.
1000655764.korean: - 하지만... 내게 닿는 것은 바람에 날린 눈가루뿐.

1000655766.english: - A basket containing the sedatives Daphne and Lise had given me, the apple the Dryad had carved, and the blanket Aqua had brought, lay overturned in the snow.
1000655766.korean: - 다프네와 리제에게 받아온 안정제와, 드리아드가 깎은 사과, 그리고 아쿠아가 담은 담요가 들어있는 바구니가 눈밭에 나동그라졌다.

1000655767.english: ...... I don't need any of it.

1000655768.english: - I picked up the scattered items and placed the basket next to Titania.
1000655768.korean: - 흩어진 물건들을 주워담고, 바구니를 티타니아 옆에 내려놓았다.

1000655769.english: - I sat back down, took out the novel Harpyia had recommended, and opened it.
1000655769.korean: - 다시 자리를 잡고 앉아서, 하르페이아에게 추천받은 소설책을 꺼내 펼쳤다.

1000655771.english: - Titania, who had been staring at me silently, slowly sank to her knees, burying her face in them.
1000655771.korean: - 말없이 나를 노려보던 티타니아는 천천히, 무릎에 얼굴을 묻으며 주저앉았다.

1000655772.english: - The frost storm was still raging fiercely, but near me, it was only enough to flutter the edges of the bookshelves.
1000655772.korean: - 여전히 서리 폭풍은 맹렬하게 몰아치고 있었지만, 내 근처에선 책장 끝을 팔랑거리게 하는 정도일 뿐이었다.

1000655774.english: - For a while, only the ominous sound of the wind echoed thru the snowy plains, but then a single, almost melting voice drifted thru.
1000655774.korean: - 한동안 흉흉한 바람 소리만 들리던 설원에 한 가닥, 녹아 없어질 듯한 목소리가 흘렀다.

1000655775.english: ... Why don't you just give an order?

1000655776.english: I'll listen quietly to your story and say, 'Be happy.' Then the Queen... she'll be happy, just as you wished, won't she?
1000655776.korean: 얌전히 네 이야기를 듣고, '행복해져라' 라고. 그럼 여왕은… 네 소원대로 행복해질 텐데?

1000655779.english: Then give the order...! To the Queen, to me...! Be happy right now!
1000655779.korean: 그럼 명령을 하란 말야…! 여왕한테, 나한테…! 지금 당장 행복해지라고!

1000655780.english: I'm saying, end this pain, this hatred I never even wanted...!
1000655780.korean: 이 고통을, 바라지도 않는 증오를 끝내달란 말야…!

1000655783.english: - Titania's original personality, as I heard from Leah.

1000655784.english: - I think Titania would rather bottle things up inside than hurt others.
1000655784.korean: - 티타니아는 남을 괴롭힐 바에야 마음속에 꾹꾹 눌러 담아 둘 거라고 생각한다.

1000655785.english: - Even though it became poison and exploded like this... I still believe it can be turned around.
1000655785.korean: - 비록 그것이 독이 되어서 이렇게 폭발해버렸지만… 아직 되돌릴 수 있다고 믿는다.

1000655786.english: - Surely, within Titania's frozen heart, there must be a desire to laugh and talk with her sisters, and to spend leisurely time together.
1000655786.korean: - 티타니아의 얼어붙은 마음속에는 분명, 자매들과 함께 웃으며 이야기하고, 느긋한 시간을 보내고 싶다는 마음이 존재할 테니까.

1000655787.english: - Because if it's Leah, she definitely would.

1000655788.english: - And if it's the Leah I know... I think no one wants to hurt anyone.
1000655788.korean: - 그리고 내가 아는 레아라면... 누구도 상처입히고 싶지 않을 거라고 생각한다.

1000655789.english: - He took off his protective suit helmet and set it down. A cool but gentle breeze brushes against my hair.
1000655789.korean: - 방호복의 헬멧을 벗어 내려놓았다. 서늘하지만 잔잔한 바람이 머리카락을 스친다.

1000655790.english: ...Do you know that the Queen could kill you right now if she wanted to?
1000655790.korean: ……지금 여왕이 마음만 먹으면 너, 죽여버릴 수 있다는 거… 알고 있어?

1000655793.english: - The frost storm surrounding us is intensifying and weakening repeatedly.
1000655793.korean: - 우리를 둘러싼 서리 폭풍은, 거세졌다 약해졌다를 반복하고 있다.

1000655794.english: - In the middle of it all, Titania is biting her lip and staring at me silently.
1000655794.korean: - 그 한가운데에서 티타니아는, 입술을 깨물고 말없이 나를 바라보고 있다.

1000655796.english: The frost storm that seemed like it would rage for a long time stopped as if it were a lie.
1000655796.korean: - 한참을 몰아칠 것 같던 서리 폭풍이 거짓말처럼 멎었다.

1000655798.english: - And at the same time, Titania's body slowly crumbled away.
1000655798.korean: - 그리고 동시에, 티타니아의 몸이 스르르 무너져 내렸다.

1000655799.english: - A faint smile, perhaps a sneer or perhaps a sigh of relief, played on Titania's lips as she held him.
1000655799.korean: - 안아 든 티타니아의 입가엔 비웃음 같기도, 안도한 것 같기도 한 희미한 미소가 맺혀 있었다.

1000655802.english: - As I sat up, what I saw was his room, which I had been to a few times before.
1000655802.korean: - 몸을 일으키자 보이는 건 몇 번 와본 적이 있는 그의 방.

1000655804.english: - My blurry vision clears, and the scene around the bed comes into focus.
1000655804.korean: - 흐리던 시야가 선명해지고, 침대 주변의 풍경이 눈에 들어온다.

1000655805.english: - Lise and Daphne, sleeping shoulder to shoulder.
1000655805.korean: - 서로 어깨를 맞대고 잠들어 있는 리제와 다프네.

1000655806.english: - A dryad sitting on the floor, leaning against the bed and nodding off, and an aqua sleeping in her arms, also nodding off.
1000655806.korean: - 바닥에 앉아 침대에 등을 기대고 꾸벅꾸벅 졸고 있는 드리아드와, 그 품에 안겨서 마찬가지로 졸고 있는 아쿠아.

1000655809.english: - The closest person to me, lying face down on the bed... Leah.
1000655809.korean: - 나와 가장 가까운 곳, 침대에 엎드려 있는… 레아.

1000655811.english: - The moment I saw that, hatred welled up again from deep within my heart.
1000655811.korean: - 그 모습을 본 순간, 마음 깊은 곳에서 또다시 증오가 끓어오른다.

1000655812.english: - Even tho I know it was created and planted by someone... I can't resist it.
1000655812.korean: - 그것이 누군가에 의해 만들어진, 심어진 것이라는 것을 알고 있으면서도… 나는 그것에 저항할 수 없다.

1000655813.english: - I hate you. I want to kill you. Who cares about family anyway?
1000655813.korean: - 난 너를 증오해. 난 너를 죽여버리고 싶어. 가족 따위 알 게 뭐야.

1000655814.english: - The headache gets worse, and your heart starts beating fast.
1000655814.korean: - 두통이 심해지고, 심장이 빠르게 뛰기 시작한다.

1000655816.english: - Just as I was about to surrender to that feeling, the figure of the last person in the room caught my eye.
1000655816.korean: - 그대로 그 감정에 몸을 맡기려는 순간, 방에 있던 마지막 한 명의 모습이 눈에 들어왔다.

1000655818.english: - His figure, sitting on a folding chair, arms crossed, and asleep.
1000655818.korean: - 간이 의자에 앉아, 팔짱을 끼고 잠들어 있는 그의 모습.

1000655819.english: - Seeing him sleeping with his mouth half-open and drooling...
1000655819.korean: - 입을 반쯤 벌리고, 침까지 흘리면서 자고 있는 그 모습에…

1000655821.english: The emotions that were boiling up inside me gradually subside. The excruciating pain that was coursing thru my entire body subsides.
1000655821.korean: -  마음 속에서 끓어오르던 감정들이 차츰 사그러든다. 온몸을 달리던 격통이 가라앉는다.

1000655822.english: - ... Yeah, anyone would feel that way seeing such a foolish sight.
1000655822.korean: - ...그래, 저런 바보 같은 모습을 보면 누구라도 그렇겠지.

1000655823.english: - I slowly sat up. That wind woke Leah up, but she's just quietly looking at me.
1000655823.korean: - 천천히 몸을 일으켰다. 그 바람에 레아가 깨어났지만, 조용히 나를 바라보고만 있다.

1000655824.english: - Similarly, I passed the dryads, Aqua, Lise, and Daphne, who had woken up and were watching me, and stood before him, who was still asleep.
1000655824.korean: - 마찬가지로 잠에서 깨어나 나를 지켜보는 드리아드, 아쿠아, 리제, 다프네를 지나쳐, 아직도 잠들어 있는 그의 앞에 섰다.

1000655826.english: - I was so dumbfounded that I started laughing.

1000655827.english: - Yeah, it's not for any other reason, just because it's ridiculous.
1000655827.korean: - 그래, 다른 무슨 이유도 아닌, 어이가 없어서일 뿐.

1000655828.english: - Because the person who was so desperate, who tried so hard and with all their might to change my mind, who said they would make me happy, is fast asleep at the most important moment.
1000655828.korean: - 그렇게나 비장하게, 그렇게나 전심전력으로 내 마음을 돌려놓으려 했던, 나를 행복하게 만들어 주겠다고 했던 인간이 가장 중요한 순간에 쿨쿨 자고 있으니까.

1000655829.english: - But, although I don't understand it myself, somehow...
1000655829.korean: - 하지만, 나 스스로도 이해할 수 없지만, 어쩐지.

1000655830.english: - That's what made me think, "That's so him."

1000655832.english: - How long had I been sleeping? I woke up with the feeling of something poking my cheek.
1000655832.korean: - 얼마나 자고 있었던 걸까. 무언가 볼을 찌르는 느낌에 눈이 뜨였다.

1000655833.english: - Then, before my eyes, the person who had been nursing me with the fairy for several days after I collapsed was extending their index finger.
1000655833.korean: - 그러자 눈앞에는, 쓰러진 후 며칠 동안 페어리와 함께 간호했던 사람이 검지 손가락을 내밀고 있었다.

1000655835.english: You said you'd listen to my story. You made plans and then overslept?
1000655835.korean: 이야기 들어준다며. 약속 잡아 놓고 늦잠이나 자는 거야?

1000655836.english: - I blinked, trying to understand the situation. Behind Titania, fairies are quietly watching us.
1000655836.korean: - 눈을 깜빡이며 상황을 파악하려 애썼다. 티타니아의 뒤에는 조용히 우리를 바라보고 있는 페어리들.

1000655838.english: ... The Queen just thot they could have a little chat. Because you're being so annoying.
1000655838.korean: ...여왕은 그냥 이야기나 좀 해보자고 생각했을 뿐이야. 네가 하도 귀찮게 하니까.

1000655839.english: - Titania stopped there and looked away. The fairies are watching Titania quietly, with faces of relief.
1000655839.korean: - 티타니아는 거기까지 말하고 시선을 피했다. 페어리들은 그런 티타니아를 가만히, 안심한 얼굴로 바라보고 있다.

1000655840.english: - There's no touching scene of the sisters hugging and crying, but I think this is enough for now.
1000655840.korean: - 자매들이 얼싸안고 눈물을 흘리는 감동적인 장면은 없지만, 지금은 이걸로 충분하다고 생각한다.

1000655841.english: - The Ice Queen's heart, frozen for over a hundred years... Because, beyond time, I've started to melt here, little by little.
1000655841.korean: - 백 년 넘게 꽁꽁 얼어붙어 있던 얼음 여왕의 마음이... 시간을 넘어, 이곳에서 조금씩 녹기 시작했으니까.

1000655847.english: ...You mean Titania probably used to be as kind as Rhea too.

1000655849.english: …I'll do it. This is mostly my responsibility.

1000655851.english: Trust me. Let me handle it.

1000655853.english: How's your body? I heard you collapsed again.
1000655853.korean: 몸은 좀 어때? 또 쓰러졌다고 들었어.

1000655854.english: Maybe not with me, but… not with your sisters.

1000655855.english: You all worked hard. I'm here now, so rest.

1000655856.english: I've got plenty of time. And...

1000655859.english: No. I should've done this a long time ago.

1000655862.english: They said they wouldn't let me go empty-handed.

1000655863.english: It's how things are lately, right? Doing our own thing side-by-side. Ah, and this-
1000655863.korean: 요새 일과잖아. 옆에서 서로 할 거 하는 거. 아, 그리고 이거-

1000655865.english: I'll leave it here—take it if you need it.

1000655868.english: I want you to be happy.

1000655870.english: So tell me everything you've been holding inside.
1000655870.korean: 그렇게 속에 담아뒀던 것들, 전부 말해줘.

1000655871.english: Phew, I feel like I can breathe now.

1000655872.english: Sorry, it's hard to hear properly when I'm wearing this.
1000655872.korean: 미안, 이거 쓰고 있으면 소리가 잘 안들리거든.

1000655874.english: I also know it's not that you don't want to open up.
1000655874.korean: 그럴 마음 먹을 마음이 없다는 것도 아니까.

1000655883.english: I've finished handing out all the flyers!

1000655890.english: They messed around with the Commander and... uh...

1000655894.english: That actually helped them come to their senses a bit. Just a while ago, they couldn't even stand...
1000655894.korean: 그나마 그게 정신 좀 차린 거야. 좀 전에는 서 있지도 못했으니까...

1000655895.english: A-a kiss for an hour... ugh...
1000655895.korean: 하, 한 시간 동안 키스... 으...

1000655896.english: If something like that happens to you... what would it feel like...
1000655896.korean: 그런 거 당해버리면... 어떻게 되는 걸까...

1000655898.english: Ah, yeah. I finished handing out all the flyers.
1000655898.korean: 아, 응. 전단지 다 돌리고 왔어.

1000655900.english: Yes. We're almost done preparing for the opening, too.
1000655900.korean: 네. 저희도 개점 준비 거의 다 끝나가요.

1000655901.english: We just need to do a final route check, a rehearsal, and then clean up.
1000655901.korean: 마지막으로 동선 체크하고, 예행 연습한 다음에 청소만 하면 돼요.

1000655902.english: This genius pâtissier is ready too.

1000655903.english: I can prepare a whole 200 items on the menu!

1000655905.english: Then we're gonna taste all 200 of them, right?
1000655905.korean: 우리 그럼 200가지 전부 다 시식해보는 거지?

1000655907.english: Th-that won't do. We haven't finished ordering all the ingredients yet.
1000655907.korean: 그, 그건 안 돼. 아직 재료를 덜 발주했거든.

1000655909.english: We'll gradually add more items to the menu while we're running. It's a kind of sales strategy!
1000655909.korean: 영업하면서 조금씩 메뉴를 더 추가해 나갈 거야. 일종의 판매 전략이지!

1000655910.english: I tasted a few just a while ago, and they were really delicious.
1000655910.korean: 조금 전에 몇 가지 맛봤는데 정말 맛있었어요.

1000655911.english: We saved some for you too, Nereid. Here, here.

1000655913.english: Ah! But I saw something while handing out flyers?
1000655913.korean: 아! 근데 내가 전단지 돌리다가 봤거든?

1000655914.english: Over there, across from the fountain—there's another building, right? Looks like they're trying to open a café there too.
1000655914.korean: 저쪽, 분수 반대편에 다른 건물 있잖아? 거기도 카페를 하려나 봐.

1000655917.english: What if the customers end up going there instead of to our shop...
1000655917.korean: 손님분들이 저희 가게가 아니라 거기로 가버리시면 어쩌죠...

1000655919.english: Munch munch... Ah, but they said it's a café, but kind of different.
1000655919.korean: 우물우물... 아, 그런데 카페는 카페인데 좀 다르댔어.

1000655920.english: Live... café? I think that's what it was called. Apparently, a singer performs there, and they even sell alcohol.
1000655920.korean: 라이브... 카페? 뭐 그런 이름이었는데, 안에서 가수가 노래도 하고 술도 판대.

1000655921.english: Hmm, more like a bar? Then it won't really overlap with us.
1000655921.korean: 흐음, 바 같은 느낌인가? 그러면 우리랑 겹치지는 않겠네.

1000655922.english: Still, it'll probably affect our business...
1000655922.korean: 그래도 저희 영업에 영향이 있을 텐데...

1000655924.english: Yes... Just the fact that we all prepared the café together already means a lot, but...
1000655924.korean: 네... 다 같이 카페를 준비한 것만으로도 분명 의미는 있지만...

1000655925.english: Still, if not many people come, it'll feel lonely.

1000655926.english: Can't be helped. Then this genius pâtissier will develop even more menu items—
1000655926.korean: 어쩔 수 없네. 그러면 이 천재 파티시에르님이 좀 더 많은 메뉴를 개발해서-

1000655928.english: I have a good idea, would you like to hear it~?
1000655928.korean: 저한테 좋은 아이디어가 있는데, 들어 보실래요~?

1000655929.english: What the—she's back from the dead? Your lips aren't chapped?

1000655931.english: Ahem ahem. That idea is! The revival of the Commander-only special menu, which was canceled after the internal meeting for being too provocative!
1000655931.korean: 흠흠. 그 아이디어는 바로! 내부 회의 결과 너무 자극적이라 취소됐던 사령관님 전용 스페셜 메뉴의 부활이에요!

1000655933.english: It would be nice if the Commander came, but we still need to think of a way to bring more people.
1000655933.korean: 사령관님이라도 와주시면 좋겠지만, 그래도 더 많은 분들이 오실 수 있는 방안을 생각해야 해요.

1000655934.english: Kuk, as expected, Deputy Captain, you're so innocent~ pure white.

1000655936.english: Think carefully. If we can successfully trap the Commander in our shop with Thetis's special menu...
1000655936.korean: 잘 생각해 보세요. 이 테티스의 특제 스페셜 메뉴로... 사령관님을 저희 가게에 붙잡아 두는 데에 성공한다면!

1000655937.english: Then naturally, other people will come to our shop to see the Commander too!
1000655937.korean: 자연스럽게 다른 분들도 사령관님을 보러 저희 가게에 올 거라구요!

1000655941.english: And~ if you promote me to floor manager, I'll specially allow this special menu duty to be shared in rotation instead of just me~
1000655941.korean: 거기에~ 저를 홀 매니저로 승진시켜 주신다면, 특별히 이 스페셜 메뉴 담당을 저 혼자가 아니라 돌아가면서 하게 해드릴게요~

1000655943.english: What, Neri, you don't want to?

1000655944.english: Ah, no, it's not that I don't want to...

1000655945.english: It's just... I heard you wear that kind of outfit for... like, doing really naughty stuff... If I wear that and end up kissing the Commander or something...
1000655945.korean: 이런 옷은 그게... 완전 야한 일 하려고 입는 거라고 들었는데... 이거 입고 사령관이랑 키스하거나 하면...

1000655948.english: S-still, the Commander is a discerning person!
1000655948.korean: 그, 그래도 사령관님은 분별 있으신 분이니까요!

1000655949.english: He wouldn't go that far... right in the middle of the store... probably...
1000655949.korean: 매장 한가운데에서 그... 그렇게까지 하시지는 않으실... 거예요...

1000655950.english: T-to be honest, if the Commander pushes hard... I don't think I could refuse...
1000655950.korean: 소, 솔직히 난... 사령관이 밀어붙이면 거절할 자신 없는데...

1000655956.english: Isn't it about time you gave up? You're wasting time.

1000655957.english: Shouldn't you, Head of Arsenal, be the one giving up!
1000655957.korean: 포기는 아스널 대장님이 하셔야 하지 않습니까!

1000655958.english: Playing too hard to get isn't attractive, you know.
1000655958.korean: 너무 튕기는 것도 매력 없어 보이는 법이다.

1000655959.english: Don't act that way toward the Commander.

1000655961.english: What are you so worried about? The café license, outfits, music, alcohol, interior design—everything has already been taken care of.
1000655961.korean: 뭐가 그렇게 걱정이지? 이미 카페 영업권, 의상, 음악, 술, 인테리어 등등 모든 문제를 해결해 두었다.

1000655962.english: Miss Ferro, you just need to bring yourself.
1000655962.korean: 페로 양은 그냥 몸만 오면 된다.

1000655963.english: Ah, and if it's honor you're after, just say so. I'll give up the manager position for you.
1000655963.korean: 아, 혹시 명예를 원하는 거라면 말하도록. 점장 자리는 양보해 주겠다.

1000655965.english: The interior work is almost finished.
1000655965.korean: 내부 인테리어 작업 거의 마무리 됐어요.

1000655966.english: Go take a look, and if there's anything else you'd like to request, feel free to let us know.
1000655966.korean: 들어가서 한 번 보시고, 추가로 더 부탁하고 싶으신 거 있으시면 얼마든지 말씀해주세요.

1000655967.english: Thanks. I'll go check it out.

1000655969.english: Would you like to work with me on something?
1000655969.korean: 나와 일 하나 같이 하지 않겠나?

1000655972.english: I like how straightforward you are.

1000655973.english: I'll prepare everything you'll need in advance. I'll contact you soon, so just show up on time.
1000655973.korean: 필요한 건 내가 미리 준비해두겠다. 곧 연락할 테니, 시간에 맞춰 출근하면 된다.

1000655974.english: I'm looking forward to it. What will I be doing?

1000655975.english: Singing is a given, and if possible, I'd like you to play at least one instrument.
1000655975.korean: 노래는 기본에, 가급적 악기 하나 정도를 다뤘으면 좋겠군.

1000655976.english: Miss Ferro said she's not thinking of practicing any instruments.
1000655976.korean: 페로 양이 악기 연습은 할 생각이 없다고 해서 말이야.

1000655982.english: Chief of Security Lilith. I'd like to open a live café with your precious little sister. What do you think?
1000655982.korean: 리리스 경호 대장. 귀하의 소중한 동생과 함께 라이브 카페를 좀 열고 싶은데, 어떻게 생각하나?

1000655986.english: Please take good care of Perrault. She's still really shy.
1000655986.korean: 페로를 잘 부탁드려요. 아직도 수줍음을 많이 타거든요.

1000655987.english: They're so shy about making noise that they always cover their mouth tightly and only make muffled sounds.
1000655987.korean: 소리 내는 것도 부끄러워해서, 매번 입을 꼭 막고 숨죽인 소리만 낸다고-

1000655989.english: Haha, don't worry about that. I'll take responsibility and make you a woman who is honest with her own feelings.
1000655989.korean: 하핫, 그건 걱정 말도록. 내가 책임지고 스스로의 감정에 솔직한 여자로 만들어주지.

1000655991.english: Ferro. Then listen carefully to the Arsenal captain, and since dinner is in the garden, come on time.
1000655991.korean: 페로. 그럼 아스널 대장님 말씀 잘 듣고, 저녁은 정원에서 먹을 거니까 시간 맞춰서 오렴.

1000655994.english: What about Fenrir? You're in charge of nite security today, aren't you?

1000655995.english: Your sister will prepare it separately.

1000655996.english: Okay, I'll go now. See you later.

1000655999.english: Then I'll be counting on you, Manager Ferro.

1000656000.english: ... Since I'm the manager, I'll be in charge of running the store.
1000656000.korean: ...제가 점장이니까 가게 운영은 제가 관리할 거예욧.

1000656002.english: The building felt a bit empty, so I put up a sign. Do you happen to have any cafe names in mind?
1000656002.korean: 건물이 조금 허전해서 간판을 달았는데, 혹시 카페 이름 생각해 두신 것 있으신가요?

1000656004.english: Let's call it CAFE amor. Because love is the most important value!
1000656004.korean: CAFE amor로 하지. 사랑이야말로 가장 중요한 가치니까!

1000656008.english: ...The air here is filthy from the start.

1000656009.english: This is... yeah, the scent of bunny girls...!

1000656010.english: The source of the evil energy I felt from over there was right here!
1000656010.korean: 저편에서부터 느껴지던 악의 기운의 출처가 여기였어!

1000656011.english: Hehe... I'll stain this place with blood... the red blood of bunny girls...!
1000656011.korean: 후후... 이곳을 피로 물들여주지... 바니걸들의 붉은 피로...!

1000656012.english: ...Hmm. Still, those ones have an unusually strong bunny spirit.
1000656012.korean: ...음. 그래도 저 녀석들, 보기 드물게 강렬한 바니 스피릿을 가졌는걸.

1000656013.english: Alright... let's make a few allies first.

1000656015.english: After meeting Bunny King... something else began to blaze within me. Yes... that is, love...! My burning heart for Bunny King— no, for Commander! Now, not the 'blazing spirit of the bunny' but this hot and sweet feeling is the driving force of my life...! ...Ah, sorry for overdoing it. It's just a little embarrassing. Ehehe... I really like you too, Commander.
1000656015.korean: 바니 대왕 씨를 만나고... 내 안에서 또 다른 무언가가 타오르기 시작했어. 그래... 그건 바로, 러브...! 바니 대왕-&n아니, 사령관 씨를 향한 내 불타는 마음이야! 이제 '타오르는 바니의 혼'이 아니라 이 뜨겁고 달콤한 감정이 내 삶의 원동력...!&n...아, 응. 오버해서 미안해. 그, 그냥 좀 부끄러워서. 에헤헤... 나도 정말 좋아해, 사령관 씨.

1000656016.english: ...True love begins with knowing what the other person wants. I wore clothes in Master’s taste and practiced songs they'd like... what I learned here helped. ...You wonder what I want? I only need Master. I'm greedier than I look, you know?
1000656016.korean: ...진정한 사랑은 상대가 원하는 게 뭔지 아는 것부터 시작이래요.&n주인님 취향의 옷을 입고, 좋아하실 만한 노래를 연습했는데... 여기서 배운 게 도움이 됐네요.&n...제가 원하는 게 뭔지 궁금하시다구요? 저는 주인님만 있으면 돼요. 보기보다 욕심쟁이죠?

1000656017.english: Ah... hehe, it's nothing. I didn't expect preparing something for the one I love and seeing them happy about it would be this joyful. ...So, could you lend me your hand for a moment? Can you feel it? Because of you... my heart pounds like when I first met you. I may act immature like an adolescent girl, drunk on this aching feeling, but please understand.
1000656017.korean: 아... 후후, 별거 아니다. 사랑하는 이를 위해 무언가를 준비하고, 그것에 사랑하는 사람이 기뻐해 준다는 게 이렇게나 기쁠 줄은 생각하지&n못한 것뿐. ...그래, 잠시 손을 빌려주겠나? 느껴지겠지? 그대 때문에 이렇게나... 그대를 처음 만났을 때처럼 가슴이 두근거리고&n있다. 이 애달픈 마음에 취해서, 사춘기 소녀처럼 어른스럽지 못한 모습을 보일지도 모르지만... 이해해주기 바란다.

1000656018.english: Getting oil on my hands and working on machines used to be everything to me. Since meeting you, I've come to discover sides of myself I didn't know. ...Today I discovered another new side. I never thought I'd be this excited over receiving a thin metal ring... May I hold you? I want to breathe in your arms, smile, and... love.
1000656018.korean: 손에 기름이 묻고, 기계를 만지는 게 제 모든 거였는데. 당신과 만난 뒤로부터는 저도 몰랐던&n제 모습을 알아가게 돼요. ...오늘도 제 새로운 면을 깨닫게 됐구요. 얇은 금속 고리를&n받은 걸로 이렇게 들뜰 줄은... 안아도 될까요? 당신 품에서 숨 쉬고, 미소 짓고 또... 사랑하고 싶어요.

1000656019.english: When I was at the lighthouse I prayed only to be allowed outside. Ever since the Commander took me out, it all feels like a dream. Eating snacks with the others, playing fun games... and someone reading the bedtime stories I used to read alone at night. Thank you, Commander... you'll stay by my side from now on too, right? Right?
1000656019.korean: 등대에 있을 땐 밖에 나가게만 해달라고 기도했었는데. 거기서 사령관이 날 데리고 나와준 뒤부터 전부 꿈만 같아.&n다른 애들이랑 같이 과자도 먹고, 재밌는 놀이도 하고... 또, 저녁에 혼자 읽던 동화책을 누군가가 읽어주고.&n고마워, 사령관... 앞으로도 쭉 곁에 있어줄 거지? 그치?

1000656021.english: Where does ‘sexual appeal' come from, I wonder.

1000656022.english: - I have basic common sense, but I lack it in the details. While looking at the records of the past in this Memory Ark... Our Orca ship realized something was wrong.
1000656022.korean: - 기본적인 상식은 있지만, 세세한 곳에서 상식이 부족한 나는 이번 기억의 방주에서 과거의 기록들을 보면서... 우리 오르카 호는 무언가 이상하다는 것을 깨달았다.

1000656023.english: - They are all my beloved comrades, so I don't want to bring it up again, but Bioroids were developed as 'products'. So, it's natural to have an attractive appearance.
1000656023.korean: - 나에게는 전부 사랑하는 대원들이기에 굳이 또 끄집어내기는 싫지만, 바이오로이드는 ‘상품’으로써 개발되었다. 그러니 기본적으로 매력적인 외모를 갖는 것은 당연.

1000656024.english: - However, the costumes are different. While some members have outfits designed to enhance their sexual appeal, most do not. Because it's basic to wear clothes that suit your role.
1000656024.korean: - 그러나 의상은 다르다. 기본적으로 포함된 의상이 성적인 매력을 돋보이도록 디자인된 대원도 있지만, 대부분은 그렇지 않다. 본인의 역할에 맞는 의상을 입는 게 기본이니까.

1000656026.english: - The more I become aware, the more my gaze is drawn to the amount of exposed skin on the Orca crew members. Things that were perfectly fine just a while ago...
1000656026.korean: - 의식하기 시작할수록, 오르카 대원들의 살색 면적에 시선을 빼앗긴다. 분명 얼마 전까지만 해도 아무렇지도 않았던 것들인데...

1000656030.english: - Okay, what led me to contemplate this proposition was... It's because of the members' bunny girl outfits.
1000656030.korean: - 그래, 이 명제에 대해 고찰하게 된 것은... 대원들의 바니걸 복장 때문이다.

1000656031.english: - Actually, compared to the bold outfits the members usually wear, bunny girl costumes aren't that revealing.
1000656031.korean: - 사실 평소에 대원들이 즐겨 입는 파격적인 의상에 비하면, 바니걸은 그렇게 노출도가 높다고는 할 수는 없다.

1000656032.english: - But... What is this fluttering feeling?
1000656032.korean: - 그렇지만... 설레이는 이 마음은 대체 뭐지?

1000656033.english: - The bunny headband that twitches with every movement and the adorable bunny tail attached to the lower back are captivating.
1000656033.korean: - 움직일 때마다 쫑긋거리는 토끼 머리띠와, 등허리에 앙증맞게 달린 토끼 꼬리가 내 마음을 뒤흔든다.

1000656034.english: - Of course, we can't forget the graceful legs of the members, all of whom have great bodies, and the cups that support their well-shaped breasts, which are the very symbol of femininity.
1000656034.korean: - 물론, 하나같이 좋은 몸매를 가진 대원들의 각선미와, 여성스러움의 상징 그 자체인, 모양 좋은 가슴을 받치는 컵도 빼놓을 수 없겠지.

1000656036.english: - On top of that... I even know exactly what's under that thin costume.
1000656036.korean: - 거기에 더해... 심지어 나는 저 얇은 의상 아래가 어떤 모습인지도 낱낱이 알고 있다.

1000656037.english: - I know all too well that a beautifully sculpted female form, one that you can't help but be captivated by, is hidden beneath that thin garment.
1000656037.korean: - 푹 빠져들 수밖에 없는 아름답게 조각된 여체가, 저 얇은 의상 아래에 숨어있다는 것을 너무나도 잘 알고 있다.

1000656038.english: - And... ...that even the slightest touch of embellishment can dramatically increase the appeal of that beautiful art... I'm realizing it now.
1000656038.korean: - 그리고... 그 아름다운 예술에 아주 살짝, 장식을 가미하는 것만으로도 매력이 폭증한다는 것을... 지금 난 깨닫고 있다.

1000656040.english: - I think. Therefore, it exists. The words left by an ancient philosopher, which I saw in the Ark's records.
1000656040.korean: - 나는 생각한다. 고로 존재한다. 방주의 기록에서 보았던, 고대 철학자가 남긴 말.

1000656041.english: - It's funny how just a little while ago, I was so swayed by Eva's words that I was agonizing over 'who I am.'
1000656041.korean: - 불과 얼마 전까지만 해도 에바의 말에 휘둘려 ‘내가 누구인가’에 대해 고민했던 것이 우스워진다.

1000656042.english: - Who I am and what I am are so clear. I am...!
1000656042.korean: - 내가 누구인지, 내가 무엇인지는 이렇게나 명백하다. 나는...!

1000656044.english: - Back in reality, in front of me was a bunny girl who captured my heart... No, there was an Aurora wearing a bunny girl costume.
1000656044.korean: - 현실로 돌아오자 눈 앞에는 내 마음을 사로잡는 바니걸... 아니, 바니걸 의상을 입은 아우로라가 있었다.

1000656045.english: - Unusually sulking, Aurora held out a glass filled with a blue liquid.
1000656045.korean: - 흔치않게 토라진 얼굴을 한 아우로라는 푸른 액체가 담긴 잔을 내밀었다.

1000656046.english: Drink this. The prescription isn't very strong.
1000656046.korean: 이거 마셔. 도수는 별로 안 높아.

1000656047.english: What are you thinking so deeply about?

1000656048.english: - I couldn't say I was having dirty thoughts while looking at you, so I was trying to come up with a good excuse, but... Aurora smiled brightly, as if she knew everything.
1000656048.korean: - 너희를 보며 야한 생각을 하고 있었어, 라고 말할 수는 없으니 적당히 둘러대려고 했지만... 아우로라는 다 안다는 듯이 방긋 웃었다.

1000656049.english: Do you like it? What we're wearing.

1000656050.english: Hehe, I wore it all for the commander, so even tho I'm embarrassed, I hope you'll look at it a lot.
1000656050.korean: 에헷, 전부 사령관을 위해서 입은 거니까~ 부끄럽긴 해도 많이 봐줬으면 좋겠어.

1000656051.english: Then please be sure to stop by our CAFE amor too!
1000656051.korean: 그럼 우리 CAFE amor에도 꼭 들러줘~

1000656052.english: Does this young lady know what she just did?
1000656052.korean: - 이 아가씨는 방금 본인이 무슨 짓을 한 건지 알기나 할까?

1000656053.english: - The bunny girl who ignited my pure heart left a cute greeting and went to the other bunny girls.
1000656053.korean: - 내 순수한 마음에 불을 지른 바니걸은 귀엽게 인사를 남기고 다른 바니걸들에게 가버렸다.

1000656054.english: This is Café Horizon~ Please enjoy some delicious coffee and desserts before you go~
1000656054.korean: 카페 호라이즌입니다~ 맛있는 커피랑 디저트 드시고 가세요~

1000656055.english: Nereid! Can you help out on the floor for a bit?

1000656056.english: Huh? Already? I thought I was on from the afternoon.

1000656057.english: We've had a ton of customers come in.

1000656061.english: Undine, hurry up! The orders are piling up!

1000656062.english: Ah, got it! Ugh, what was next again… umm…
1000656062.korean: 아, 알았어! 으으, 이 다음이... 그러니까아...

1000656063.english: I brought Nereid. I'll help out in the kitchen.
1000656063.korean: 네레이드 데리고 왔어요. 제가 주방일을 도울게요.

1000656065.english: Deputy Captain, then could you help with this dough?
1000656065.korean: 부함장님, 그럼 이거 반죽 좀 부탁해!

1000656066.english: A-All of this is order slips?

1000656067.english: The takeout orders are over there, separately.
1000656067.korean: 포장 주문은 거기 옆에 따로 있어.

1000656071.english: Your drink is ready. Please enjoy.

1000656074.english: Gulp gulp... Ahhh... it's really delicious~

1000656076.english: Well then, let me try too... gulp. Eheh...

1000656077.english: ...Ma'am. It seems you've already had quite a bit.

1000656078.english: Ehh~? I can still drink more~ Right, Yumi~?
1000656078.korean: 에에~? 아직 더 마실 수 있어요오~ 그쵸오, 유미 양~?

1000656080.english: Soon, I'll have tried everything on the menu~ Bring me something else, please~
1000656080.korean: 이제 곧 모든 메뉴를 다 마셔볼 수 있으니까~ 다른 것도 주세요~

1000656083.english: ...You two, please try not to cause too much commotion.

1000656087.english: Here's your order... Wait, why is Miss Azaz sitting here?!
1000656087.korean: 여기 주문하신... 왜 아자즈 양이 여기 앉아있나요?!

1000656088.english: Hehe, I was just having a quick drink with some friends. Miss Makina, here you go.
1000656088.korean: 후후, 잠깐 친구들이랑 한 잔 하고 있었어요. 마키나 양, 여기요.

1000656090.english: Sigh... No, the problem is with this person here.

1000656091.english: Hurry back to the counter. Can't you see the orders piling up— Huh?
1000656091.korean: 빨리 카운터로 가세요. 주문 밀려있는 거 안보이... 어라?

1000656092.english: Everything's already prepared, you just need to serve it.
1000656092.korean: 다 준비해 뒀으니까 서빙만 하면 돼요.

1000656093.english: Manager Ferro, you should serve too before coming back.

1000656094.english: Aah... It's a flavor as deep and sweet as death...
1000656094.korean: 아아... 죽음과도 같이 깊고 달콤한 맛이에요...

1000656095.english: Right? I knew you'd like it.

1000656096.english: Sigh... We're still open for business, so please don't drink too much.
1000656096.korean: 하아... 영업 중이니까 너무 많이 마시진 마세요.

1000656097.english: Of course. I've only had three drinks so far.
1000656097.korean: 당연하죠. 아직 세 잔 밖에 안 마셨는걸요.

1000656101.english: Almost. Just need to make a few final adjustments.

1000656102.english: You've worked hard. Still planning to refuse payment?

1000656104.english: ...I'm just helping out a friend, that's all.

1000656105.english: Haha, that's a wonderful friendship. When you're finished, come have a drink.
1000656105.korean: 후후, 멋진 우정이군. 마무리되면 한 잔 하고 가도록.

1000656106.english: I was going to do that anyway.

1000656107.english: But are you guys performing the show yourselves?
1000656107.korean: 그런데 공연은 너희가 직접 하는 거야?

1000656108.english: That was the plan, but... I'm busier than I thought, so I don't have time to practice.
1000656108.korean: 그럴 계획이었다만... 생각보다 바빠서 연습할 시간이 나지 않는군.

1000656109.english: Then that's a big problem, isn't it?

1000656110.english: Once the shop stabilizes, I'll have to practice even if it means staying up all night. Because the number of employes is gradually increasing.
1000656110.korean: 가게가 안정되고 나면 밤을 새서라도 연습을 해야겠지. 점점 종업원들이 늘고 있으니까 말야.

1000656111.english: After the final adjustments are done, make sure we can at least do a rehearsal. Otherwise, it's meaningless.
1000656111.korean: 세부 조정 끝나고 나서 리허설 정도는 할 수 있게 해두라구. 안 그러면 의미없으니까.

1000656112.english: Hmm... I see. I need to start right away, even today.

1000656113.english: Manager Ferro, Ms. Azaz. Let's have a meeting for a moment.
1000656113.korean: 페로 점장, 아자즈 양. 잠시 회의를 하지.

1000656114.english: - As I entered the building with a fluttering heart, I was greeted by a sophisticated interior completely different from the outside.
1000656114.korean: - 설레는 마음으로 건물에 들어서자, 바깥과는 완전히 다른 세련된 인테리어가 맞아주었다.

1000656115.english: - Under the soft lighting, the members, all dressed in bunny girl outfits, are serving.
1000656115.korean: - 은은한 조명 아래, 하나같이 바니걸 의상을 입은 대원들이 서빙을 하고 있다.

1000656118.english: No, it's Cafe Amor. Did you make a reservation?

1000656119.english: Oh, I heard. Could you please wait a moment?

1000656122.english: Yeah. I'm not in a full bunny girl outfit, but...
1000656122.korean: 응. 나는 정식 바니걸 복장은 아니지만...

1000656124.english: - I almost grabbed Carol and started ranting without even realizing it.
1000656124.korean: - 나도 모르게 캐럴을 붙잡고 열변을 토해낼 뻔했다.

1000656125.english: As expected... The commander likes bunny girls, huh?

1000656126.english: - To be precise, it was our members in bunny girl outfits that he liked...
1000656126.korean: - 정확히는 바니걸을 입은 우리 대원들을 좋아하는 거였지만...

1000656127.english: - Perhaps it's true that the more you see something, the more you grow fond of it, because the more I look at it, my liking for bunny girl outfits has been steadily increasing lately.
1000656127.korean: - 자주 볼수록 정이 드는 법인지, 계속 보다보니 요새는 점점 바니걸 의상에 대한 호감도가 수직 상승하고 있다.

1000656130.english: - Correction. A bunny girl costume is the best.

1000656132.english: Oh...! Then this place must be heaven for the captain!
1000656132.korean: 오호...! 그렇다면 이곳은 캡틴에게 천국이나 다름없겠군!

1000656133.english: Is there anyone there? Get the captain to the VIP room right away!
1000656133.korean: 게 누구 없느냐! 어서 캡틴을 VIP룸으로!

1000656135.english: - At the call of Triaina, another bunny girl appeared from inside the shop.
1000656135.korean: - 트리아이나의 부름에, 가게 안쪽에서 또다시 바니걸이 등장했다.

1000656138.english: Alright, let's quickly escort them and show them the Bunny Bunny full-course service we've prepared!
1000656138.korean: 자아, 어서 모셔가서 우리가 준비한 바니바니 풀코스 서비스를 보여드리자구~

1000656142.english: Are you here to work? Just get the uniform and receive the customer service training, and you can start anytime.
1000656142.korean: 혹시 일하려고 오셨어요? 의상만 갖춰 입으시고, 응대 교육만 받으시면 언제든-

1000656145.english: I've only come to check if you rabbits have the right consciousness.
1000656145.korean: 나는 너희들이 토끼로서 올바른 의식을 갖고 있는지 확인하러 온 것일뿐.

1000656147.english: But it was just a false alarm. Ifrit was right.

1000656148.english: You... You're already a great rabbit. If I still had the strength I used to, I would have performed the ceremony to recognize you as a Moon Person.
1000656148.korean: 너희는... 이미 훌륭한 토끼다. 내게 예전 같은 힘만 남아있었다면, 월인으로 인정하는 의식을 치뤄줬을텐데.

1000656150.english: Right. I am a "Moonfolk" — from the place you call the Moon.
1000656150.korean: 그래. 나는 너희가 달이라고 부르는 곳에서 온, 월인이지.

1000656151.english: Waaah... Then you're like, a moon rabbit or something?

1000656154.english: Most people don't believe such outlandish stories right away.
1000656154.korean: 이런 허황된 이야기를 바로 믿는 사람은 흔치않으니까.

1000656155.english: Ah... Well, it's not so much that I believe it — it just seems more fun if it is true.
1000656155.korean: 아... 뭐, 믿는다기보다는 그냥... 있으면 더 재미있을 것 같잖아요.

1000656156.english: I'm part of Orbital Watch, but I've never actually left Earth even once.
1000656156.korean: 저는 오비탈 와쳐 소속이면서 지구 밖으로 한 번도 못 나가 봤으니까요.

1000656157.english: Mars is one thing, but I always imagine—what if I land on the Moon and rabbits greet me with rice cake hammers~?
1000656157.korean: 화성도 화성이지만, 달에 딱 갔는데 토끼들이 떡방아 들고 맞이해주지 않을까~ 하는 생각을 하거든요.

1000656160.english: To think that someone with such a pure heart still exists among Earthlings...
1000656160.korean: 이렇게 순수한 마음을 가진 자가 지구인 중에 남아있다니.

1000656161.english: Wait right there. I'll speak to Magic Gentleman and make sure you're reborn as a Moonfolk.
1000656161.korean: 기다려. 내가 매직 젠틀맨에게 이야기해서 널 꼭 월인으로 거듭나게 해줄 테니까.

1000656162.english: Wow, really? I get to become a moon rabbit too?
1000656162.korean: 와아, 진짜요? 저도 달토끼 되는 거예요?

1000656163.english: Yes. Although... you'll have to undergo a complex and painful ritual. But—it'll be worth it.
1000656163.korean: 그래. 비록 복잡하고 고통스러운 의식을 치뤄야만하지만... 그럴만한 가치가 있을 거야.

1000656164.english: Hehe, okay! I'll be looking forward to it.

1000656165.english: Well then, I must go. I have to keep watch over the rabbits outside this place.
1000656165.korean: 그럼 난 이만. 이곳 밖에 있는 토끼들을 감시해야 하니까.

1000656168.english: By the way, are you really from Earth?

1000656170.english: Hmm... No, sorry. Your accent threw me off for a moment.
1000656170.korean: 흐음... 아니, 미안하다. 억양이 특이하길래 착각했다.

1000656174.english: Emily, time to wake up. We need to head back now.

1000656178.english: I was gonna... hiccup marry him... eheh...
1000656178.korean: 오빠랑... 딸꾹. 결혼... 하기로 했는데... 에헷...

1000656181.english: She was curious, so I just let her have one sip.
1000656181.korean: 궁금해하길래 한 모금 맛보게 해줬을 뿐이다.

1000656183.english: Prepare something to help her with the hangover.
1000656183.korean: 숙취를 해소할 수 있는 걸 준비해주도록.

1000656185.english: I'm not sure I'll be able to attend class tomorrow.
1000656185.korean: 내일 수업은 나갈 수 있을지 모르겠군요.

1000656186.english: Why not take a day off? Just learning from me should be enough.
1000656186.korean: 하루 쉬면 어떤가. 내가 가르치는 것만으로도 충분하다.

1000656187.english: I hold class precisely to avoid that kind of attitude.
1000656187.korean: 그렇게 안 하려고 수업을 내보내는 겁니다만.

1000656189.english: Anyway, thanks for today. You're probably even busier than us with the party preparations, but your help was invaluable.
1000656189.korean: 어쨌든, 오늘 고마웠다. 파티 준비로 우리보다도 더 바쁠텐데 큰 도움이 됐어.

1000656190.english: Not at all, it was nothing.

1000656192.english: The secretariat is taking the lead, and it's shaping up to be grander than ever.
1000656192.korean: 비서실을 주축으로 그 어느때보다 성대하게 준비중입니다.

1000656193.english: That's good to hear. And there's a suitable location just outside the ecological preservation zone.
1000656193.korean: 잘됐군. 마침 생태 보존 구역 외곽에 적당한 장소도 있으니.

1000656194.english: Then I'll take Emily back now. I need to get ready for the performance.
1000656194.korean: 그럼 에밀리를 데리고 돌아가도록. 나는 공연 준비를 해야하니.

1000656195.english: ...You're aware that the secretariat expressed serious concern about your song choices, right?
1000656195.korean: ...비서실에서 대장님의 노래 선곡에 대해 강한 우려를 표출하신 건 알고 계시죠?

1000656196.english: They're even considering designating you as a "special management case" and limiting access for the younger crew members.
1000656196.korean: 특별 관리 대상으로 지정해서, 어린 대원들의 접근을 제한하는 방안도 검토중입니다.

1000656198.english: I'll be performing at our café too, but the song is meant for the Commander. Have I ever not been sincere with the Commander?
1000656198.korean: 우리 카페에서도 공연할 예정이지만, 사령관에게 들려주기 위한 곡이다. 내가 사령관에게 진심이 아닌 적이 있었나?

1000656199.english: ...You're right. It was a needless concern.

1000656202.english: On your way out, grab a hangover remedy from the kitchen.
1000656202.korean: 돌아갈 때 주방에서 숙취 해소 음료라도 받아가지.

1000656204.english: You worked hard today. But... our work starts now.
1000656204.korean: 오늘 영업 고생 많았다. 하지만... 우리의 일은 이제부터 시작이지.

1000656205.english: Is it singing practice? I already picked my song.

1000656206.english: Desirable. Muse is busy right now and can't help with practice, but it was lucky to receive a pre-made song.
1000656206.korean: 바람직하군. 지금은 뮤즈 양이 바빠서 연습까지 도와줄 수는 없겠지만, 미리 만들어둔 곡을 받을 수 있었던 건 행운이었다.

1000656207.english: There's a lot of competition, after all. In that sense, this song is… huh?
1000656207.korean: 아무래도 경쟁자가 많으니까요. 그런 의미에서 이 곡은... 어라?

1000656208.english: "Love is like a parfait…?" The one I picked was definitely…!
1000656208.korean: 사랑은... 파르페처럼...? 제가 골랐던 건 분명...!

1000656210.english: This isn't the song I chose! Captain Arsenal, what's going on?!
1000656210.korean: 제가 고른 노래는 이게 아니잖아요! 아스널 대장님, 어떻게 된거죠?!

1000656211.english: Trust me. That song is exactly right for you, Ferro.
1000656211.korean: 날 믿어라. 그 노래야말로 페로 양에게 딱 맞는 노래다.

1000656213.english: "Love is like a parfait~" And then… kkyu, kkyukkyu?!
1000656213.korean: 사랑은 파르페~ 처럼... 그 다음에... 뀨, 뀨뀨?!

1000656216.english: How am I supposed to sing a song like this?! Please give me back my original one!
1000656216.korean: 제가 이런 노래를 어떻게 부릅니까! 어서 원래 걸 돌려주세요!

1000656217.english: Ahem. Sorry for laughing, but I'm serious. That song will perfectly bring out Ferro's charm.
1000656217.korean: 흠흠. 웃어서 미안하군. 그래도 진심이다. 그 노래야말로, 페로 양의 매력을 완벽하게 이끌어낼 수 있겠지.

1000656218.english: I-I'm not the type for this kind of cute stuff—
